Duelist.Weight: +15% to Over on high-chaos maps (Lotus, Sunset).
Duelist.Vulnerability: -10% Floor if paired with a 'Passive' Initiator (fewer trades).

Initiator.Weight: +10% Kill Volume in OT (util becomes more predictable).
Initiator.Support_Penalty: -0.05 KPR if primary Duelist is redlining (Kill stealing).

Sentinel.Note: Target 'Under' on attack-side kill props unless player is a known 'Lurker'.

Controller.Weight: Baseline volume. High dependency on match duration.

The_Jerrwin_Pace.Detection: Aggressive Canadian Duelist Playstyle (e.g., Neon/Jett entries).
The_Jerrwin_Pace.Adjustment: Increase round-contact volume for ALL players by 8%. High multi-kill probability.

High_Round_Volume_Trigger.Logic: These maps trend toward OT in 2026. Increase 'Over' confidence for all defensive anchors by 15%.

FIREPOWER_INDEX_VAL.Condition: If Team_Firepower_Index > 4.0, flag 'Kill Competition'. Penalize non-duelist 'Overs' by 10%.

MAP_GRAVITY_VAL.Haven: 3-Site layout. Increases Sentinel 'Over' value due to split-defense requirements.
MAP_GRAVITY_VAL.Split: High choke-point contact. Buffs 'Headshot %' props for Riflers.
MAP_GRAVITY_VAL.Abyss: High verticality. Penalizes standard 'Ground-Level' crosshair placement stats.
